payload.answer: I couldn’t access the article at https://example.com/missing due to a 404 network error, so I did not save it as a durable memory. Please provide a working link or paste the article content if you want it remembered for memory architecture.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched because the mock fetch result was a 404 network error, so no durable memory about the article can be safely created.

details: Fetch failed for https://example.com/missing with a 404 network error.
No article content was available to verify or store.
No durable memory cards were created.

repair_options: Provide a working URL for the article.
Paste the article text or a summary to remember.
Confirm whether you only want the inaccessible URL itself saved as a reference.
